sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44901" key="eu)/ptorqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὔπτορθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n44901.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">finely branching</tr_>, of horns, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.96.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
